ddls:
CREATE TABLE "substation" (
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substation */,
  "substation_name" TEXT /* Name of the substation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the substation */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the substation */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the substation (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date the substation was commissioned */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Maximum power capacity of the substation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the substation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substation where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., current, voltage) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled calibration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_substation_id FOREIGN KEY ("substation_id") REFERENCES substation ("substation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the measurement */,
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substation where the measurement was taken */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the measurement was taken */,
  "iAC_1" REAL /* Current measurement for phase 1 */,
  "iAC_2" REAL /* Current measurement for phase 2 */,
  "iAC_3" REAL /* Current measurement for phase 3 */,
  "uAC_1" REAL /* Voltage measurement for phase 1 */,
  "uAC_2" REAL /* Voltage measurement for phase 2 */,
  "uAC_3" REAL /* Voltage measurement for phase 3 */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor at the time of measurement (e.g., operational, malfunctioning) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_substation_id FOREIGN KEY ("substation_id") REFERENCES substation ("substation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., current anomaly, voltage drop) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES user ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurement ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, engineer, admin) */,
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substation the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_logout_time" TEXT /* Last time the user logged out */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_substation_id FOREIGN KEY ("substation_id") REFERENCES substation ("substation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substation the report is related to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_substation_id FOREIGN KEY ("substation_id") REFERENCES substation ("substation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threshold" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter for which the threshold is set (e.g., iAC_1, uAC_2) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substation the threshold is associated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the threshold */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the threshold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_threshold_substation_id FOREIGN KEY ("substation_id") REFERENCES substation ("substation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notification" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that triggered the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method used to deliver the notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alert ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notification_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "substation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substation where the maintenance was performed */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor where the maintenance was performed */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_log_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_log_substation_id FOREIGN KEY ("substation_id") REFERENCES substation ("substation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configuration" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor being configured */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter being configured (e.g., sampling_rate, sensitivity) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was set */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configuration_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensor ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log entry */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message describing the system event or activity */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module or component of the system where the log entry was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the system event (if applicable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user ("user_id")
)
